name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh (Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh Resort)
address: Lot D14B Nguyen Tat Thanh street, Cam Hải Đông, Nha Trang, Việt Nam
description:
Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh - Nơi lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh là một khách sạn 5 sao nằm tại thành phố biển Nha Trang, Việt Nam. Với thiết kế hiện đại và tiện nghi đẳng cấp, đây là địa điểm lý tưởng cho những kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ.

Với thời gian nhận phòng từ 02:00 PM và trả phòng cho đến 12:00 PM, Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh mang đến sự linh hoạt và tiện lợi cho khách hàng. Khách sạn này có tổng cộng 171 phòng, đảm bảo rằng bạn sẽ luôn có nơi nghỉ thoải mái và sang trọng.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh đã được tu sửa lại vào năm 2022, mang đến không gian mới mẻ và hiện đại cho du khách. Được xây dựng vào năm 2022, khách sạn này được trang bị những tiện nghi tiên tiến và đội ngũ nhân viên chuyên nghiệp sẽ đảm bảo rằng bạn có một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời. Đặc biệt, chính sách của khách sạn cho phép trẻ em trong độ tuổi từ 6 đến 11 nghỉ miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho gia đình có trẻ nhỏ.

Tiện nghi giải trí tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng và hấp dẫn. Khách sạn có một quầy bar thân thiện và phục vụ các loại đồ uống ngon lành, tạo không khí vui tươi và thư giãn cho du khách. Ngoài ra, khu nghỉ dưỡng còn có dịch vụ massage và spa chuyên nghiệp, giúp du khách tận hưởng những phút giây thư giãn và làm mới cơ thể. 

Bên cạnh đó, khu vườn xanh mát tại Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh là nơi lý tưởng để du khách thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian tự nhiên. Du khách cũng có thể tham gia vào phòng trò chơi vui nhộn hoặc thưởng thức những cuốn sách thú vị tại thư viện của khu nghỉ dưỡng. Với những tiện ích giải trí đa dạng này, Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh chắc chắn sẽ mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm thú vị và không thể quên.

Các tiện nghi thể thao tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, cung cấp một loạt các tiện nghi thể thao đa dạng để du khách thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình. Khách sạn có hồ bơi trong nhà và hồ bơi ngoài trời, cho phép du khách tận hưởng không gian nước trong mọi thời tiết. Ngoài ra, khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng có bãi biển riêng tư, cho phép du khách thả mình vào làn nước trong xanh và tắm nắng trên bãi cát trắng mịn.

Nếu bạn muốn duy trì sức khỏe và thể lực trong kỳ nghỉ, khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng có phòng tập thể dục miễn phí và phòng yoga. Bạn có thể tham gia các bài tập thể dục hàng ngày hoặc tham gia các buổi yoga để thư giãn cơ thể và tinh thần. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp các dịch vụ thể thao nước như điều khiển bằng động cơ và không động cơ, cho phép du khách khám phá biển bằng cách lái jet ski hoặc tham gia các hoạt động thể thao nước khác. Đối với những ai yêu thích chơi darts, khách sạn cũng có bảng darts để bạn thể hiện khả năng ném darts của mình. Đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh và tận hưởng những trải nghiệm thể thao tuyệt vời!

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi tiện lợi đáng kinh ngạc. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là, dịch vụ phòng, lễ tân, Wi-Fi miễn phí tại các khu vực công cộng và khu vực chỉ định hút thuốc. Wi-Fi miễn phí cũng được cung cấp trong tất cả các phòng, giúp du khách tiếp tục kết nối với thế giới bên ngoài. 

Khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ nhận phòng/nhận phòng nhanh, giữ hành lý, dọn phòng hàng ngày và khu vực sưởi ấm bằng lò sưởi. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có tiện ích phòng giặt tự động, giúp du khách dễ dàng giặt quần áo trong suốt thời gian lưu trú. Với những tiện nghi này, Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh cam kết mang đến cho du khách một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái và tiện lợi.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi vận chuyển để đáp ứng nhu cầu của du khách. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ taxi, giúp du khách di chuyển linh hoạt và nhanh chóng trong khu vực. Đặc biệt, Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh còn cung cấp bãi đậu xe miễn phí, giúp du khách tiết kiệm chi phí khi đi lại.

Trải nghiệm thoải mái với các tiện nghi phòng tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho bạn một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời với các tiện nghi phòng đẳng cấp. Mỗi phòng nghỉ tại khu nghỉ dưỡng được trang bị một bếp nhỏ với lò sưởi, tạo nên không gian ấm cúng và lý tưởng để bạn thưởng thức những buổi tối lãng mạn bên gia đình và bạn bè. 

Bên cạnh đó, các phòng nghỉ tại Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh còn có ban công riêng, nơi bạn có thể tận hưởng không gian ngoài trời tuyệt vời và ngắm nhìn toàn cảnh biển xanh thẳm. Với những tiện nghi hiện đại và sang trọng này, Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh sẽ đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của bạn để tạo nên một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ.

Trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời. Khách sạn này cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng, bao gồm nhà hàng, dịch vụ đặt phòng, và khu vực nướng BBQ.

Nếu bạn muốn tổ chức buổi tiệc nướng BBQ thân mật cùng gia đình và bạn bè, Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh cũng có khu vực nướng BBQ sẵn sàng phục vụ. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, đảm bảo sự tiện nghi và sạch sẽ cho du khách. Đừng bỏ lỡ bữa sáng ngon miệng với buffet sáng đa dạng và bữa sáng kiểu Châu Âu tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh.

Các loại phòng tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, cung cấp nhiều loại phòng đa dạng để đáp ứng nhu cầu của du khách. Khám phá Cam Hải Đông - Thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng tại Nha Trang

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh nằm tại Cam Hải Đông, một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn tránh xa sự ồn ào của thành phố và tận hưởng không gian yên bình giữa thiên nhiên tươi đẹp. Với vị trí tọa lạc trên bãi biển dài và cát trắng mịn, du khách tại đây có thể tận hưởng những ngày nghỉ thư giãn dưới ánh nắng mặt trời và ngắm nhìn cảnh biển tuyệt đẹp.

Cam Hải Đông còn nổi tiếng với hải sản tươi ngon và đa dạng. Du khách có thể thưởng thức những món ăn đặc sản độc đáo như cua biển, tôm hùm, sò điệp và nhiều loại hải sản khác tại các nhà hàng và quán ăn ven biển. Ngoài ra, khu vực này cũng có nhiều điểm tham quan và giải trí như Công viên Thủy sinh Nha Trang, Bãi Dài, và Công viên cây xanh Cam Ranh. Với vị trí thuận lợi, du khách có thể dễ dàng khám phá các điểm đến này và tận hưởng những trải nghiệm thú vị tại Cam Hải Đông.

Hướng dẫn di chuyển từ sân bay đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh nằm ở Cam Hải Đông, Nha Trang, Việt Nam, và có thể dễ dàng tiếp cận từ các sân bay lân cận. Đối với du khách đến từ Sân bay Quốc tế Cam Ranh, hãy chuẩn bị cho chuyến đi khoảng 10 phút trên đường để đến nơi. Bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ taxi hoặc đặt xe riêng từ sân bay để tiến đến khu nghỉ dưỡng một cách nhanh chóng và tiện lợi.

Nếu bạn đến từ Sân bay Quốc tế Tân Sơn Nhất ở Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh, hãy chuẩn bị cho chuyến đi kéo dài khoảng 1 giờ và 20 phút để đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh. Có nhiều phương tiện di chuyển từ sân bay này như taxi, xe buýt hoặc xe đưa đón riêng. Bạn có thể chọn phương tiện phù hợp với nhu cầu và tiện ích cá nhân của mình.

Khi đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh, bạn sẽ được trải nghiệm không gian nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời với các tiện ích hiện đại và dịch vụ chất lượng. Khu nghỉ dưỡng nằm gần bãi biển và cung cấp các hoạt động giải trí thú vị như bơi lội, chơi golf và tham gia các tour tham quan vùng lân cận. Hãy dành thời gian thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh.

Khám phá những điểm đến thú vị gần Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh tọa lạc gần hai điểm đến nổi tiếng là Bãi Dài và The Shack, đảm bảo mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm thú vị và đáng nhớ. Những nhà hàng xung quanh Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh tọa lạc gần một số nhà hàng nổi tiếng như Eo Gio Bai Dai Seafood Restaurant, Tropicana Beach Club, La Baia tại Mia Resort Nha Trang, The Shack, La Casa, Sandy Shores Beach Bar & Grill, Sandals Restaurant, Blu Lobster, Chubeli và Quán Quỳnh Trâm. Du khách sẽ có cơ hội trải nghiệm ẩm thực độc đáo và tận hưởng không gian biển tuyệt đẹp tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh so với giá phòng trung bình ở Nha Trang

Với giá phòng trung bình chỉ $118, Khu nghỉ dưỡng Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam. So với giá phòng trung bình ở thành phố này là $67, Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh không chỉ mang đến những dịch vụ và tiện nghi đẳng cấp, mà còn có mức giá hợp lý hơn so với các khách sạn khác trong khu vực. Khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao các tiện nghi tại Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh, với điểm số 8.4. Khu nghỉ dưỡng này cung cấp đầy đủ các tiện ích để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng, bao gồm hồ bơi, nhà hàng, quầy bar và phòng tập thể dục. demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text: Resort hợp với những nhóm bạn gia đình thích sự yên tĩnh nghĩ dưỡng có đầy đủ tiện nghi trong khu và trong villa
sample_comments.title: Chuyến đi thư giãn phục vụ trẻ em tuyệt vời
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào,

Chúng tôi chân thành cảm ơn bạn và gia đình đã tin tưởng lựa chọn Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh cho kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Chúng tôi vô cùng vinh dự khi nhận được những lời khen từ bạn về chất lượng dịch vụ. Đây chính là nguồn động lực quý giá để chúng tôi không ngừng nâng cao tiêu chuẩn phục vụ, hướng đến sự hoàn thiện theo định hướng của tập đoàn Wyndham Hotels & Resorts.

Hy vọng sẽ sớm có cơ hội được chào đón bạn và gia đình quay trở lại Cam Ranh trong thời gian tới. Chúng tôi cam kết sẽ tiếp tục mang đến những trải nghiệm trọn vẹn và những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ hơn nữa cho kỳ nghỉ của bạn.

Trân trọng,
Đặng Thành Tân
Tổng Quản Lý

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.negatives: Xe điện ban đêm pải đợi rất lâu, thái độ nhân viên buffet sáng khó chịu với khách khi sắp bàn ngồi.

sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text: Tôi đã sử dụng cho gia đình 5 người, có 3 nhà vệ sinh và 3 phòng, rất tiện lợi khi sử dụng độc lập. Có hồ bơi trong nhà, nên nếu đi với trẻ nhỏ thì sẽ rất tốt. Cơ sở vật chất cũng tốt, bữa sáng và các tiện ích khác như hồ bơi cũng được sử dụng tốt. Xe điện cũng đến nhanh, thật tuyệt. Tôi khuyên các gia đình đi du lịch nên thử!
sample_comments.title: Tốt lắm.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào,

Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh을 선택해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.

저희 서비스와 직원에 대한 따뜻한 말씀에 깊이 감사드리며, 앞으로도 더 나은 서비스로 보답하겠습니다.

다음에 Cam Ranh에 오실 때 다시 모실 수 있기를 기대합니다.

감사합니다.
Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh 경영진 드림
sample_comments.room_type: Biệt Thự Khu Vườn 3 Phòng Ngủ

sample_comments.title: Trên Trung Bình
sample_comments.negatives:
Resort k hề có bellman hỗ trợ hành lí cho khách
Villa không có bàn ủi, k có điện thoại bàn để gọi lễ tân, khách phải tự gọi hotline trên app
Dọn chưa sạch vẫn còn xót tóc khách cũ
Buffet sáng le que vài món
Nhân viên resort phục vụ khá chán, k chuyên nghiệp bằng các resort mình đã đi

sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text:
Trước hết, nhân viên ở quầy đã nói tiếng Hàn rất tốt và thân thiện, nên tôi đã có một chuyến đi vui vẻ mà không gặp phải bất kỳ phiền phức nào, đặc biệt là trong quá trình nhận phòng, họ đã nâng cấp chỗ ở cho tôi, tôi xin cảm ơn về điều đó. 
Tình trạng vệ sinh cũng ổn nhưng có một chút kiến trên sàn. Dù vậy, đây là một chỗ ở thân thiện với môi trường, nên mọi thứ đều cảm thấy rất tốt. 
Xe điện cũng đến nhanh chóng và các nhân viên lái xe cũng rất thân thiện. 
Tuy nhiên, do hơi xa trung tâm thành phố nên chi phí di chuyển có hơi cao, nhưng việc ở xa trung tâm lại mang đến cảm giác yên tĩnh và thanh bình hơn. Đây là một chỗ ở mà tôi muốn quay lại lần nữa. 
Tôi khuyên bạn nên thử ^^
sample_comments.title: Nơi nghỉ ngơi thoải mái và thân thiện.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào,

Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh을 선택해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.

저희 서비스와 직원에 대한 따뜻한 말씀에 깊이 감사드리며, 앞으로도 더 나은 서비스로 보답하겠습니다.

다음에 Cam Ranh에 오실 때 다시 모실 수 있기를 기대합니다.

감사합니다.
Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh 경영진 드림

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: Chi phí phù hợp

sample_comments.text: Từ trung tâm thành phố thì xa nên việc mua sắm khá khó khăn, nhưng từ sân bay thì rất gần, thích hợp để ở vào ngày nhập cảnh đầu tiên hoặc ngày trước khi xuất cảnh. Villa có hồ bơi thật sự rất đẹp. Có lẽ vì mới xây nên rất sạch sẽ và nội thất cũng rất ưng ý. Mỗi phòng đều có TV Samsung. Có cả máy giặt Samsung, lò vi sóng, lò nướng, và bếp từ, đầy đủ các tiện nghi với bàn ăn rộng rãi, ga trải giường sạch sẽ, mọi thứ thật hoàn hảo. Đặc biệt hồ bơi riêng rộng và sạch hơn tôi nghĩ. Đây là chuyến du lịch Việt Nam đầu tiên cùng mẹ, và mẹ đã hài lòng và nói rằng sẽ quay lại. Dù là biệt thự độc lập nhưng trong nhà không có côn trùng. Nhà hàng thì đắt hơn một chút so với trung tâm, nhưng bữa sáng rất ngon, pizza, hamburger và beef steak trong khách sạn thật sự rất ngon. Wyndham Garden có chất lượng tuyệt vời so với giá cả. Tôi rất recommend!
sample_comments.title: Thực sự tốt
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào, 

Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh 을 선택해 주셔서 감사합니다. 

저희 리조트의 서비스와 직원에 대한 좋은 평가에 항상 깊이 감사드립니다. 모든 고객님께 항상 좋은 기억과 따스한 경험을 제공해 드릴 것을 약속드리며, 언제든 저희 리조트에서 다시 뵙기를 바라겠습니다.

Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh관리부 드림

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives:
Do an ko nhiều món nhưng rất ngon. Bãi biển & tiện nghi sạch sẽ.
Khu gym/ kid club rất thích và thoải mái.
Dịch vụ bbq tại villa đáng thử.
sample_comments.negatives: Có muỗi ở villa ho boi nhiều

sample_comments.title: Terrible staff
sample_comments.text:
1st time in my life that the resort charged guest for cleaning the drap that only have 2cm stain from the beaches and sand, that is very easy to clean

the staff even said "you should clean it yourself before checking out"

0 star if the system let me do it
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Vu,
Thank you so much for staying with us 
I am reviewing this process with my colleagues and this shall not be applied anymore to any other guest. My apologies for causing you discomfort upon your check out 
Warm regards,
Rami Obeid 
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Enjoyed the stay, but certainly not a 5* experience
sample_comments.positives: Great location, decent food and kind staff
sample_comments.negatives: Our villa smelled like putrid sewer for 4 days. Someone came to fix it one day but the next day the smell was back again. Also, our tv was broken.

sample_comments.title: Unprofessional staff
sample_comments.text: The cooks are rude. Overall, the staff prioritize foreign customers over Vietnamese customers, especially the electric cab dispatchers and drivers. Staff are Vietnamese and Vietnamese customers pay the same price for the same service as foreign customers. We asked for an electric cart yesterday first and the cart arrived to serve the Korean customers next to us. After that, the dispatcher told us to wait for the next cart while we have a senior in our family.
sample_comments.response:
Dear "Guest Name",

Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh Resort. I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies.

Your feedback is very important to us. Please rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent any future occurrences. Here at Wyndham Garden, we continuously strive to meet your needs and expectations.
 
We appreciate the time you took to share your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the future.

Warm regards, 
General Manager

sample_comments.title: It's ok
sample_comments.positives: Location
sample_comments.negatives: Not enough utensils in the kitchen. The sofas in the living room got stained

sample_comments.title: good
sample_comments.text: not bad

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives:
F&B quality is great ! We love the breakfast combo in the restaurant ! Highly recommended for anyone who is not a big fan of crowded and long waiting line buffet breakfast. 

Front office staff is helpful to us. Thank you very much.
sample_comments.negatives:
We booked 3-Bebroom beach front villa however there is no direct access from the villa to the beach, a bit unusually to beach front villas we stayed in other properties. A bit disappointing ! 

Lobby area is not clean up to 5-star standard, the floor is dusty and front glass doors are full of fingerprints which lead to a not good first impression of the property

sample_comments.title: Bad experience
sample_comments.text: It's a 5-star hotel, but at night when we opened the main door to the garden, we saw rats running around the property (we saw at least two). Our family has never encountered such poor sanitation at a luxury hotel. The swimming pool and bathroom were not properly cleaned. The pool was full of fallen leaves, and the bathroom was dirty... Room service was extremely slow. The only positive points were the beautiful beach and quick check-in.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Spacious villa, new&clean rooms, confortable bed, beautiful sunrise view at beach and villa rooftop, nearness to airport and KN golf
sample_comments.negatives: A bit far from Nha Trang city.

sample_comments.title: Bad room service & far from any other stores.
sample_comments.text: This resort is situated far away from all other places and the room service food is not fresh. Although They changed for me but it should not be served in the first place
sample_comments.response:
Dear "Guest Name",

Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh Resort. I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies.

Your feedback is very important to us. Please rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent any future occurrences. Here at Wyndham Garden, we continuously strive to meet your needs and expectations.
 
We appreciate the time you took to share your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the future.

Warm regards, 
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Very spacious two story villa with a well-equipped kitchen, although no kitchen utensils were provided. Nice environment.
sample_comments.negatives:
1. The level of service provided by the staff was less than satisfactory. Upon arrival, we received no assistance with our luggage or any sort of welcoming gesture. In addition, the lack of a currency exchange service was quite surprising. We found ourselves in need of Vietnamese Dong during a morning out and assumed we could exchange money at the hotel. Unfortunately, this service was not available, a fact I found astonishing. The staff seemed very indifferent to our desperation. We ended up obtaining cash from a nearby spa shop.

2. The quality of food at the hotel restaurant was deeply disappointing. We opted for room service and found the french fries to be overly soggy. The Tom Yum Goong soup we ordered was served in a remarkably small portion. Considering the scarcity of dining options in the vicinity, the hotel should prioritize offering high-quality food to incentivize guests to dine in.

3. The room price did not include breakfast, which is unusual compared to similar accommodations in the area. I had previously stayed in another five-star resort in Nha Trang, where an excellent breakfast was included in a similar price range. Only four small bottles of water were provided and if you want more, you have to pay. I have never encountered this even when I was staying at a smaller hotel in central Nha Trang. 

Overall, while the facilities of the hotel are commendable, the services and amenities do not meet the standards of a five-star rating. For the price range, there are better options available in Nha Trang.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: It was very good for a three-generation family. While being close to the airport is a plus, the distance from the city can be inconvenient. I was a bit disappointed with the size of the pool, but the cleanliness was much better than the reviews suggested. Overall, I am satisfied.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Villa is nice, a small issue with aircon but the technician comes and fixes immediately
sample_comments.negatives: Villa is big enough for family

sample_comments.title: A bit remote......
sample_comments.text:
Only one restaurant open when I was there and this place is miles away from anything else ( but very close to the airport ). After 2 nights eating and drinking at the resort we ended up going to another resort for a change for dinner. 
No shuttle bus to Nha Trang or the airport and nowhere really to walk to so needed the Grab app to get around. Breakfast had a decent selection but most things quite cold ( including the coffee ). In fairness it was Tet so it was very busy. On the upside the villas / pools are great and in the main the staff are also really nice. So if you just want relax in the Villa or at the pool, it's a good place to stay.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Bruce. 
Thank you very much for staying with us and for voicing out your concerns.
During this Tet period, we had 2 restaurants operating all the dining time, and in room dining was operating none stop. But we understand that a large resort like us needs more than just 2 restaurants. To clarify your transportation concern, I confirm that we have free daily shuttle from resort to Nha Trang and back, departing every morning at 9am, and returning by 3pm. We also provide airport shuttle service as well. Furthermore, our resort has a contractual agreement with a reputable taxi company and we help our guests book their rides through front desk. Our team also helps arrange trip suggestion & recommendation to all guests. But I totally understand how you feel, that our resort is a bit far from the city, same with all other resorts in the area. We sincerely hope Cam Ranh will continue to evolve and develop into a destination with full services to add more choice to our beloved travelers

sample_comments.title: The location, the weather and the beach were perfect. However, bad impression with staff's attitude and unfurnished kitc
sample_comments.positives:
Good location with private beach few steps away from our villa. The villa is spacious with modern design. The rooms and swimming pool are gennally clean and well-mantained.
The breakfast buffet has not many variety of choices but tasting good is a plus point.
sample_comments.negatives:
I searched for a 3-bedroom-villa on Booking.com that could fit 6 people. By the time I made the reservation, I called to the hotel booking department and informed the girl that our family has 7 people, I wanted to check if any surcharges might be applied if we wanted to have 3-meal buffets at the resort. The girl advised that there will be no extra surchage for the additional person since there will be no extra bed provided, but for the lunch and dinner buffets will cost additional ~ 3,790,000vnd (for 7 people in total).
However, as soon as I arrived at the hotel, the receptionist charged us extra 950,000vnd for the 7th person. We had no choice but had to pay the extra, which was very upset us.
The villa is not funished with kitchen ultensils (no bowls, no dishes, no echopsticks or spoons...), only comes with some cups and glassess. It costs 1 million vnd to borrow those from the resort.
Not much dactivites in the resort.
The receptionist is not very supportive and unprofessional.

sample_comments.title: 가성비좋음
sample_comments.text: 주변 깜란 리조트에 비하면 정말 저렴한 편이지만 내부에 부대시설이 너무 없음.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào HyunJin,
을 선택해 주셔서 감사합니다 Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh. 저희 리조트에 다시 오시기를 환영하고 고객님께 기억에 남는 경험을 제공해드리겠습니다. 
Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh 관리

sample_comments.title: The place was clean. Staff all spoke English. Location was great.
sample_comments.positives: Rooms were nice. Staff was good and friendly. The place was clean. Buggy was not as fast.
sample_comments.negatives: At a 5 star hotel, you shouldn't have to pay extra for a latte.

sample_comments.title: Wyndham Garden Beachfront 3 Bedroom
sample_comments.text: I intentionally chose a beachfront view, but the ocean view is not very visible. It's only visible from the second-floor room, and on the first floor, it seems blocked by the swimming pool and some small trees, so only the palm trees are visible. It seems unnecessary to spend more money. The main pool is under construction, so there's noise and limited access, and the buggy cars don't come promptly. Impatient Koreans end up walking while waiting. The staff is friendly, and the living room and kitchen are spacious, but it's far from the city, and there's nothing around. There are no mirrors or tissues in the room; there are only in the bathroom. There are four bathrooms, which is nice.

sample_comments.title: My family always pick your resort to stay. We gather once a year with big group. Hope next year we come back we enjoy it
sample_comments.positives: I like the villa for a big group like my family do we can gather.
sample_comments.negatives:
The pool was dirty with dead frog in it. House sleeping arrived very late afternoon for cleaning. They forgot to take the trash in the kitchen. 
We needed extra towel in the room.

sample_comments.title: Kampan Wyndham Garden Resort 2 nights
sample_comments.text: Before departing from Kamran Airport, I took a 2-night stay and it was convenient to move to the airport. However, it is a bit far to go into the city. I thought about going further into the city to explore and eat something delicious, but I ended up relaxing as initially intended when I chose the resort accommodation. The staff are friendly and the facilities are good for families. It's a private pool villa and the price is reasonable. The disappointing part was that the water in the individual pool had a smell of bleach or cleaning agent, and there were limited food options nearby, which was a bit disappointing. Although it was possible to order delivery, it wasn't the same as eating there, which was somewhat disappointing. If I go again with my family, I think I will use it once more.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful beach front villa with extra fees for everything
sample_comments.positives: Villas were clean, spacious and private. Private plunge pool was convenient. Mr Kim, driving the golf buggy, pick up and drop off, baggage handling was always smiling and accommodating. Our family was very impressed. Greatly enjoyed special Christmas buffet at Cam Ranh Resort.
sample_comments.negatives: Promoted as villa with kitchen facilities but did not provide any plates, cutlery or kitchen equipment for usage. Not even a kitchen sink cloth to wipe spills. Had to call front desk and get charged extra for provisions. Only given 1 250ml bottle of water a day per person. Hotel charges extra for extra water bottles.

sample_comments.title: It's fine.
sample_comments.text:
It was sent on May 29, 2025, for a 0.5-night stay. 
It is close to Kamran Airport and several hotels share a long beach. 
It is good for playing on the long beach.

The meals were reasonably priced, and perhaps due to it having been open for a long time, the hygiene level was average. 
There are buffet options, individual restaurants, and delivery food available. 
There is a public swimming pool for external activities, but it seemed a bit lacking. 
However, it is well-managed. 
There were a few flying insects.

Since it is a private pension, it is good for family enjoyment. 
It seemed to be used by an appropriate ratio of Russians, Central Asians, Vietnamese, and Koreans. 
There is a female staff member who speaks Korean at a native level.

Overall, it is good for several people to enjoy quietly.

sample_comments.title: Great villas, beach and away from the crowds.
sample_comments.positives: If you are looking to get away from the crowds and have the beach practically to yourself, this is the place.
sample_comments.negatives: They had four staffed desks, but only two were checking guests in.

sample_comments.title: 가성비좋은리조트
sample_comments.text:
공항에서 가까운 리조트이므로 시내까지는 거리가 있지만 풀빌라로 가성비는 최고인듯함.
부대시설이 너무 없는게 아쉽긴 하지만 아이들 수영 즐기고 휴식하기에는 적당함.
하루에 한번 오전 9시에 한번 골드코스트로 나가는 셔틀버스 3시30분에 리조트로 돌아오는 셔틀 시간 확인하고 미리 예약해서 이용하세요
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào HyunJin,
을 선택해 주셔서 감사합니다 Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh. 저희 리조트에 다시 오시기를 환영하고 고객님께 기억에 남는 경험을 제공해드리겠습니다. 
Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh 관리

sample_comments.title: Short but pleasant stay. We will definitly be back!
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful beach, nice villas, friendly staffs, great services

sample_comments.title: Wonder Garden
sample_comments.text: The water in the accommodation is too weak. There's nothing in the accommodation like spoons and so on. The staff changed our room from a one-bed to a three-bed. It was right next to the swimming pool, and the beach was also right next to it, which was fantastic.

sample_comments.title: A pleasant stay, perfect for family getaway trip
sample_comments.positives: Good location, very short distance to the airport. Overall everything was great, we enjoyed our stay a lot.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing significant, apart from the breakfast time which was a bit too crowded during peak hour.

sample_comments.title: Resort
sample_comments.text: The accommodation was spacious, but the restaurant was small, so we couldn't use it. The pick-up service was limited, so we used Grab every time. I paid for an extra night to relax comfortably before departure, but there was no service like providing drinks instead of breakfast. Next time, I might just use a hotel. The breakfast was delicious.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Great customer service.
sample_comments.negatives: Continental breakfast coffee was always cold or room temperature. Not much dessert option for in room dining.

sample_comments.title: The accommodation is good.
sample_comments.text: The location is a bit far from the city center, so I wouldn't recommend it for sightseeing purposes, and it's not extremely clean, hehe. If you're sensitive about cleanliness, I wouldn't recommend it (mosquitoes and bugs are unavoidable). There are no supermarkets nearby, so you'll need to rely on delivery. But it's close to the airport and the beach, making it great for walks, and the swimming pool has free tubes, so you can have fun even without your own tube. The breakfast pho is delicious, the rooftop view is really nice, and the staff is friendly.

sample_comments.title: Nice
sample_comments.positives: Friendly staffs
sample_comments.negatives: Nil

sample_comments.title: Comfortable and friendly accommodation.
sample_comments.text: First of all, the staff at the desk spoke Korean well and were friendly, which allowed me to enjoy my trip without any inconvenience. I especially appreciated the upgrade of my accommodation during check-in. The hygiene was acceptable, but there were a few ants on the floor. Still, it felt great since it was an eco-friendly accommodation. The buggy arrived quickly, and the staff driving it were friendly as well. However, it was a bit disappointing that it was far from the city, resulting in some transportation costs, but being far from the city actually felt quiet and peaceful. I would like to use this accommodation again in the future. I recommend it! ^^
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào,

Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh을 선택해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.

저희 서비스와 직원에 대한 따뜻한 말씀에 깊이 감사드리며, 앞으로도 더 나은 서비스로 보답하겠습니다.

다음에 Cam Ranh에 오실 때 다시 모실 수 있기를 기대합니다.

감사합니다.

sample_comments.title: Espectacular el lugar, muy tranquilo y familiero, muy recomendable
sample_comments.positives: El servicio del personal es de 10! Muy atentos y súper cooperativos. Nos dejaron entrar antes de la hora y salimos después de la hora por qué nuestro vuelo estaba retrasado y ellos nos cooperaron para que la estancia fuera placentera.
sample_comments.negatives: Todo estaba muy bien

sample_comments.title: Great cost performance.
sample_comments.text: I stayed for 3 nights in a 3-bedroom villa. I didn't request breakfast separately and had a combo at Breeze Restaurant for 150,000 VND, which was nice. The end of January felt great, similar to Hawaii. The room facilities were also convenient. They provided fewer towels compared to other resorts, and the only downside I felt was that you have to pay a bit to use towels at the pool. It's walkable without having to take a buggy; both the lobby and the main pool are accessible on foot.

sample_comments.text: It is a very nice villa. Everything is clean. Our family have very comfortable stay there. The staff is friendly. The buffet is not really good though.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional

Le personnel a été particulièrement accueillant, toujours disponible et attentif au moindre détail. Le petit-déjeuner était varié et de grande qualité. J'ai vraiment apprécié l'ambiance calme et chaleureuse. Je recommande vivement cet endroit et j'y reviendrai avec plaisir lors de mon prochain séjour !

sample_comments.text: 오래 묵기에는 아닌듯하고 짧게 공항 근처에서 2박 정도 하기엔 좋은듯 합니다. 오래 있다보면 좀 지루할 것도 같아요. 버기를 부르면 금방오기도 하지만 가끔 때맞춰 오지 않을때가 있어서 여러번 불러야 하기도 합니다. 수영장은 청소를 하시는지 모르겠지만 수영하고나서 피부병 생기거나 한건 없어요. 나름 만족한 여행이었고 또 올 의사 있습니다.

The private pool was too cold to get in, but I did go to the main pool for a bit. I wanted to take a warm bath in the tub, but there was no bathtub available.

sample_comments.title: Cost-effective private villa with a pool.
sample_comments.text: I stayed here for half a night on the last day of my trip because it was very cheap for a pool villa. I requested to be close to the lobby as I was going to order food for delivery, and they assigned me a villa that was really close. However, I had recently stayed at another large pool villa before checking in here, so I had a lot to compare. The villa itself is modern and has many rooms, making it suitable for large families, but the private pool is too small. As a result, everyone spent most of their time in the main pool. Usually, when you book a 2-bedroom villa, you get one room on the first floor and one on the second floor, but the first floor was locked. I asked to change to the first-floor room, but after more than 30 minutes, no one came. Eventually, I went to the lobby to mention it again, and after about 20 minutes, a staff member arrived, saying the TV in the first-floor room was broken. Still, I said it was okay, and they seemed unsure what to do. Then they left, and when they came back, they said the room hadn't been cleaned... Are they joking? Anyway, since I wasn't going to sleep much and was checking out at night, I just used the second-floor room, but it was inconvenient to go back and forth. Also, this is my third time in Nha Trang, and I've stayed at different resorts for two nights each time, but I've never encountered employees as unfriendly as those here. Especially the young male staff sitting right in front of the lobby! They just stared at their phones, and when I asked something, they were rude and immediately looked back at their phones... Why do they even get paid? The main pool is divided by depth and is quite large. However, there was too much sand at the bottom, and when I dove in, the water looked dirty. There was also a bubble party that the kids seemed to enjoy. I ordered food from the restaurant next to the main pool, and the pizza was good. Payments can be made with both card and cash, but if you find it bothersome to carry cash, you can leave a deposit at check-in. It seemed like they would return the difference later. Anyway, I think it's best to go here with low expectations and just for the cost-effectiveness.

sample_comments.title: Entspanntes Resort
sample_comments.positives: Service, Restaurant besonders das Frühstück
sample_comments.negatives: Küche war nicht ausgestattet, Strand leider mit Müll

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: The resort is clean, environmentally friendly, with high-end facilities, and very close to the airport. However, there are a bit few umbrellas and chairs on the beach and around the swimming pool. There is a lot of garbage in the beach area, so it's suggested to arrange staff for daily cleanup.

sample_comments.title: Insgesamt hat uns der Aufenthalt gut gefallen!
sample_comments.positives: Sehr schöne Villen in der Anlage
sample_comments.negatives:
Servicepersonal macht manchmal einen recht unerfahrenen Eindruck. 
Auswahl beim Abendessen ist nicht sehr umfangreich.

sample_comments.title: It's completely spacious and nice.
sample_comments.text: I wish it were my home. The swimming pool was great, the living room was spacious, and the kitchen was also large. There's an oven and a washing machine! It's very convenient to use; however, the transportation is inconvenient, and there are no places to eat nearby, which is a bit unfortunate. Also, since I had an early check-out and couldn't have breakfast, I requested a meal box, and wow, I didn't know they would give so much! The quantity was so large that I left out the fruits and liquids that were difficult to take to the airport. I enjoyed the sandwiches and eggs :)

sample_comments.title: Wyndham Garden
sample_comments.text: The location is right next to KN Golf Course, so that wouldn't be a lie. It's a 5-minute distance from the airport, at the very bottom of Cam Ranh. However, the main gate is close to the lobby, which makes it easy to pick up delivery food. The structure of the villa is pleasant and nice, but the pool is a bit small, so swimming is not possible, just a water puddle. There are two main swimming pools, and the beach right in front is nice too. I had breakfast there during my 11-day stay, and I ate well without getting tired of it. There is a pretty staff member at the lobby who can speak Korean, and she took great care of us, so I ended up extending my 6-night reservation to 5 nights. It's great; the value for money is amazing. Oh, if you request cooking utensils, they lend them to you for free, although their condition isn't great. There are two staff members who can speak Korean, and we were particularly taken care of by a staff member named Hani, for which we are very grateful.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Personale efficiente,
sample_comments.negatives: La villa era sguarnita di tutto specialmente la cucina completamente vuota, la spiaggia non era mantenuta bene, era piena di destriti e plastica...

sample_comments.title: The villa was really nice.
sample_comments.text: It was the best accommodation for a family trip with children. Although it was too cold to use the private pool, the view of the accommodation right in front of the beach was absolutely beautiful. However, the first impression of the staff who took us to our room by buggy after check-in wasn't a very pleasant memory for the first day at the resort. The attitude of the staff who moved us to our room felt rough and strong, and their expression did not convey much kindness. They guided us to the room with a look and gestures that seemed to indicate anger, and only after we gave a tip did their expression brighten. The staff member's name was something like 'Tu,' but all the other staff members, excluding that one, were friendly.

sample_comments.negatives: Ontbijtruimte is te klein voor het aantal gasten.

sample_comments.title: Recommended for family units.
sample_comments.text: I highly recommend it for families looking for a large room, everything is great!! It's clean and exactly as shown in the photos, so I'm satisfied and would consider visiting again. However, there's really nothing around, and it takes 40 minutes to get to the city, so I think you should expect a round trip of about 2 hours. Also, the restaurant for dinner? It's quite expensive, and you have to feel like you're paying in Korean won for the meal. There are no utensils, pots, or chopsticks at all; you have to bring everything with you. Other than that, it's good!!

sample_comments.title: A trip with my friend's family.
sample_comments.text: My friend's family had children, so they looked for a family villa style. They liked the pool villa with a beach view and made a reservation. It was nice to have a private house, and the condition was very good for the price. However, one disappointing thing was that even before 9 AM, the housekeeper visited and left towels and toiletries. That was okay, but I requested cleaning while playing in the pool, and they did not come. I called again. The desk staff did not apologize but only said they would send someone again. After playing in the main pool for another hour and coming back, they finally did the cleaning. Everything else was fine. The buggy staff was also very friendly.

We spent 2 nights in the city and 2 nights at the resort, and the Wyndham Garden Resort is really great~~~ I would want to bring the kids along. The staff is always smiling and incredibly kind. They also promptly took care of any requests we had for our accommodations, so there were no inconveniences. It's quite far from the city, which is a bit inconvenient, but as a guest, I'm grateful for the resort's shuttle bus that takes us to the city.

sample_comments.title: I looooooved the place
sample_comments.text: Omg the staffs are all so nice. Our check in staff was Ha Viet Manh nd he was super duper nice to us. He gave us an early check in and late check out , the villas were super spacious so we rlly didn't need to go all the way to the swimming pool. You can book for the resort shuttle to go to Nha Trang where they take u at 9am and pick u up at 3:30pm. The weather was super clear which also means it was very hot but we had such a relaxing time. You can also dine in the restaurant within the resort or order delivery. And there are other restaurants u can dine at 10mins away.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: 깜라인 공황과 가까워서 좋았습니다.
sample_comments.negatives:
처음 배정 받은 방은 죽은 바퀴벌레가 여러마리 있어 엄청 당황했어요.
다음 날 방을 옮겨서 지냈는데 또 바퀴벌레가 나왔습니다.

sample_comments.title: It's a accommodation that offers great value for money.
sample_comments.text: The condition of the accommodation was excellent; it was clean and I didn't see a single bug! The amenities were well organized in the bathroom drawer, but the body lotion had someone's effort to erase the expiration date, so I didn't use it. I had a Margherita pizza and a Black Angus beef burger through room service; the pizza was just okay, but the burger was better than I expected. I used the main pool which wasn't crowded, making it easy to enjoy. Around 12 to 1, more people arrived and it seemed like there weren't enough sunbeds. We had a schedule, so we used it starting around 10, which was fine for us. A shower filter is definitely necessary; I stayed for two days and it got quite dark. Oh! When I first arrived in the room, the shower wasn't working, and I contacted the front desk through the intercom. They said they would check, but I didn't get any follow-up. After waiting for a while, I tried turning on the water again, and it started flowing. I wish they would have at least let me know... The color of the water that came out then... was almost muddy. It seemed to be water that had been stagnant. I think it would be good to run a little water from all faucets as soon as you arrive and then connect the filter. Thanks to that, I ended up throwing away a filter. Aside from this, everything was good.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào
Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh 을 선택해 주셔서 감사합니다. 
귀하의 불편을 드려 대단히 죄송합니다. 이러한 상황이 발생하지 않도록 예방 조치를 강화할 것을 약속드립니다. 
저희 리조트의 서비스와 직원에 대한 좋은 평가에 항상 깊이 감사드립니다. 모든 고객님께 항상 좋은 기억과 따스한 경험을 제공해 드릴 것을 약속드리며, 언제든 저희 리조트에서 다시 뵙기를 바라겠습니다.
Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh관리부 드림

sample_comments.title: I am very satisfied with Wonder Garden.
sample_comments.text: At first, I checked in and it was really nice. My family said they would like it if it were our home. There is the downside of being far from downtown Nha Trang, but it takes less than 10 minutes to get to the airport. The pool was private and the breakfast was delicious. I think I'll come again next time.

sample_comments.title: 깜란 맛집
sample_comments.positives: 시설은 좋았어요. 공항근처라서 새벽도착했을때 빨레 숙박할수 있어서 편했어요. 버기카도 바로오고 아주 편했어요. 풀사이드 식당음식이 맛있다고 생각됐는데 이번여행에서 이후일정은 섬의 다른 리조트에서 있었는데 거기서의 식사와 비교해보면 리조트맛집이 분명합니다. 다음에 밥먹으러 오고 싶어요.
sample_comments.negatives: 시설은 좋으나 1일 1바퀴벌레 잡아야하고 뭔지모를 톡톡튀는 쟉은벌레들이 주방과 화장실에 많았어요. 빌라수영장 물에 약처리가 과해서 냄새가 났고 그물에서 수영만하면 아이가 따갑고 아프다해서 메인풀에서 놀았어요.

sample_comments.title: Best for accommodating many people.
sample_comments.text: It's really great to stay in a villa with a lot of people and enjoy the time. However, there was a bike event during our stay, and the noise was overwhelming. Also, there weren't enough seats for breakfast, so we had to eat in a makeshift and strange place on the second floor. This was the most frustrating part. I think it would have been nice if they had notified us in advance.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: 슥소 시설, 서비스, 직원의 친절함 등 대부분의 사항이 좋습니다.
sample_comments.negatives: 욕실 배수구 날벌레가 많습니다.

sample_comments.title: I am satisfied.
sample_comments.text: Compared to the resorts nearby, the price seems to be cheap. It was great to have the entire second-floor pool villa to ourselves. On the last day, a cockroach came out in the bathroom, but when I called the front desk, they came right away and took care of it. Aside from that, everything was satisfying. The breakfast had a variety of options, which was nice.

sample_comments.title: 윈덤가든
sample_comments.positives:
저렴한 가격의 풀빌라 이용.
조용한 빌라.
sample_comments.negatives:

메인 수영장의 수질이 좋지 않음.

sample_comments.title: Third visit
sample_comments.text: Is there anywhere with better value for money? Especially for larger families, it's even cheaper. The staff are friendly, the pool villas are spacious, the communal pool is large, and the beach is nice too. The breakfast isn't particularly tasty, but it's okay to eat. I'll come back again next time I'm in Nha Trang.

sample_comments.title: 조용한 곳에서 휴식 잘 취하다 갑니다^^
sample_comments.positives: 숙소 매우 청결했고 단지도 깨끗했습니다. 동남아니까 벌레걱정을 좀 했는데 전혀 문제 없었구요. 첫날 저녁을 간단히 해결하려고 컵라면과 전자렌지에 돌려먹을 수 있는 음식을 사갔는데 컵 종류 외에 식기류는 비치되어 있지 않더라구요. 원래 사전에 식기류를 선택할 수 있는 옵션이 있나봐요, 잘 모르겠어요. 리조트 실내에 화구들은 있는데 규정상 취사는 불가한 듯 합니다. 여튼 리셉션에 식기류를 요청하니 원래 유료로 빌리는 건데 직원분께서 수저와 접시 소량을 무상 제공해주셨습니다. 성함이 T... 로 되어 있으신 것 같았는데 제가 기억을 못해서 체크아웃날 다시 뵙고 외우려 했는데 안계셨어요 ㅠㅠㅠㅠ 직원분들 모두 정말 친절하셨구, 조용하게 쉬다갈 수 있는 리조트였습니다. 어린 아기가 있는 가족이 오면 매우 적당할 것 같은 리조트였습니다.
sample_comments.negatives: 가기 전에 프라이빗 비치가 좀 기대됐는데 생각보다 썩 휴식을 취하기 좋은 환경은 아니었습니다. 아기자기하다기 보다 좀 황량하달까... 비치는 산책하고 대신 바다 보이는 수영장에서 엄청 놀았어요! 단지 구조가 좀 단순하고 녹지가 좀 적은 느낌이 있었네요

sample_comments.title: Great villas to spend time together as a family
sample_comments.text: Great private villas with private pools to spend time together as a family. The property is lush and beautifully maintained. The main pool was clean and not crowded as most folks seemed to be using their private villa pools. The private beach is clean and the water is a beautiful bright blue. The staff were amazing. Very attentive. Room service food was good but not great. The breakfast buffet was ok but not great. Super close to the airport and within striking distance of town.

sample_comments.title: 비수기(12월) 깜란 윈덤 가든 리조트 다녀옴
sample_comments.positives:
1. 늦은시간 공항에 도착하는 일정인데 다행히 공항에서 5분거리에 위치하여 빨리 쉴수 있어 좋았음.
2. 기상이 좋지 못해 이용은 못했지만 private 해변이 있고,
3. 매트리스 쿠션감은 최고였으며
4. 여행객중 생일자가 있었는데, 생일케일을 준비해 주셧음. (맛은 그닥^^) ... thank you
sample_comments.negatives:
1. 공항과 가까운 거리이므로 오히려 셔틀버스를 운행해 주시면 더 좋았을거 같고 (인근리조트는 운행중)
2. 개인풀장의 펌프소리는 어떻게 제어하는지 서면 안내가 있어야 할거 같고 (밤새 비소리와 혼돈으로 숙면하지못함)
3. 비수기에도 프로모션이 있으면 훨씬 좋겠음. (예:투숙객 1회 SPA 무료)

sample_comments.title: A cost-effective accommodation that satisfies three generations.
sample_comments.text:
It was a place I reserved to celebrate my in-laws' 70th birthday. Although it was a 3-room, beach-front villa, I was half worried and half hopeful because the price was under 250. The result was that both the adults and kids were very satisfied, and it made me realize what a villa experience is really like, so I'm recommending it to my acquaintances.

Advantages:
1. Close to the airport
2. The interior of the accommodation is neat, the private pool is fairly large, and amenities like a washing machine and microwave are convenient
3. The hotel pool is large and directly connected to the path to the beach (there's even a bubble pool party for kids on weekends)
4. The staff is very friendly
5. It's relatively inexpensive for a villa

Disadvantages:
1. It takes about 30-40 minutes by car to get to Vinpearl Island or the city
2. There were some places like rarely used shelves that had dust accumulated on them

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: 수영장이 크고, 수심이 나눠져있어서 좋았어요. 빌라도 깨끗하고 넓었습니다!
sample_comments.negatives: 우선 체크인할 때 아무 안내도 해주지 않으시더라고요. 수영장 운영 시간이나 시내 셔틀이나 등등. 그리고 주말에 단체손님이 있어서 조식먹는데 진짜 도떼기 시장인줄 알았어요. 엄청나게 혼잡했습니다 ㅜㅜ

sample_comments.title: great！
sample_comments.text: nice hotel with beautiful sea view！

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: 식사도 객실도 훌륭한
sample_comments.negatives: Late check out 이 안됐네요

sample_comments.title: Amazing Trip
sample_comments.text:
We traveled here with my wife, 18 yr old, 17 yr old and mother in law. We rented a 3 bedroom Villa right on the beach. The Villa was amazing, clean and well appointed. The AC was acting up in one bedroom and a maintenance worker came right away. Very responsive. 

The beach is cleaned by a tractor at least once a day so the garbage level is next to zero on the beach. We had 2 red flag days out of 6. Ocean temp was around 26C, lots of big waves, fun for all. The lifeguards on the beach watch diligently. 

The breakfast buffet is fantastic, get that added to your package. The pool was quiet as we came during the "off-season", maybe 20 people avg. Nice to be able to order food and drinks from the pool side. Prices are to be expected for a resort style experience. Lots of good food in town with a short Grab ride. There is a large Co-Op in town to gather day to day groceries at Vietnam prices, about a 25 min Grab ride.

My boys enjoyed the activity room playing ping pong and pool to get out of the sun. Very clean and cared for resort. The golf cart rides to and from the villa worked well when it was super hot out. They are free and take about 3 mins to arrive. 

This area has a strip of resorts that are all about 20 mins from "town". Keep that in mind. If you want a Caribbean experience in Vietnam, this is the area for you. We would come back to enjoy some quiet time away from Nha Trang and HCM city next time we come back to Vietnam., bonus is the International Airport is 5 mins away!

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: 조식은 훌륭했고 직원은 친절함
sample_comments.negatives: 빌라안에 간단한 식기가 비치되면 좋겠다

sample_comments.title: A convenient accommodation with very friendly staff.
sample_comments.text: It was great for playing in the water with kids because there were household appliances. Although the city is smaller compared to Nha Trang, there are plenty of places to eat and shop in Cam Lam city, so I was satisfied with the location. Also, delivery service is good. Delicious mangoes and Korean food are both available. Since the accommodation is a pool villa, there was plenty of space in the living room and the private pool, which was nice, and it was good for putting the kids to bed since there were separate rooms. Due to the temperature differences, we couldn't all sleep together. Having two bathrooms was also convenient. The staff were generally friendly, especially the one who helped move our luggage immediately from the lobby and the buggy driver who was really kind. He helped us when we had issues with GrabTaxi and was very kind. KIM THINH is the absolute best and always has a bright smile! There's also a staff member in the lobby who speaks Korean really well. Hani This made things very convenient. The staff were really kind to the kids, which made our stay even better. ^^ They stepped up to solve issues with restaurant pickup until the end, which was very reassuring. I came back to Korea with only good memories! The beach accessibility is a bit disappointing, but when the weather is nice, the private pool is fun to play in~~ Good value for money^^

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: 빌라 시설이 깨끗하고 공항에서 정말 가깝다. 해변은 나트랑이 좀 더 정비된 느낌이지만 해변이 가깝다. 공용 수영장도 괜찮은 편이다. 비수기라 가격도 합리적이고 선베드 충분했고 조용히 쉬기 좋았다. 하루 정도 셔틀 타고 나트랑 시내 다녀올만 하다.
sample_comments.negatives: 나트랑 시내로 가는 셔틀버스가 9시 출발 하나인데 출발 시간을 30분 늦추거나 10시 30분 정도 출발하는 셔틀이 추가 되면 좋을 것 같다. 수영말고 딱히 할 게 없어서 조금 심심하고 인근 리조트가 다 비슷하겠지만 근처에 나가서 밥 먹을 곳이 거의 없다.

sample_comments.title: Really good
sample_comments.text: It is a bit far from the city for shopping, but it's very close to the airport, making it great for staying on the first day of arrival or the day before departure. The pool villa is really beautiful. Perhaps because it was built recently, it was clean and I really liked the interior. Each room has a Samsung TV, and there are a Samsung washing machine, microwave, oven, and induction stove, making it fully equipped with a spacious dining table and clean bedding, it was perfect. Especially, the private pool was bigger and cleaner than I expected. It was my first trip to Vietnam with my mom, and she was satisfied and said she would like to visit again. Even though it's a standalone pension, there were no bugs inside. The restaurant is more expensive than in the city, but breakfast was good, and the pizza, hamburgers, and steak in the hotel were really delicious. Wyndham Garden offers excellent value for the price. I recommend it!

sample_comments.title: Perfect for using with family!
sample_comments.text:
-Advantages 
It's great to go with family! The private pool is quite large! With a depth of 1.1m, it's perfect for those with kids! The main pool is divided into three depths: 0.95m, 1.2m, and 1.4m. 

There is also a path near the main pool that leads to the sea, so you can swim in the ocean! The sea is beautiful, and the staff were very friendly! There is a washing machine available for laundry (please bring your own detergent...). 

There is a kids' program, and you can play pool, table tennis, and there is a gym! 

I had a sore throat and a fever, but I was able to receive a simple check-up at the infirmary! 

The airport is close! 

The buggy cars are fun! 

-Disadvantages 
However, I saw three cockroaches in the accommodation... and there were some ants as well...ㅠㅠ

sample_comments.positives: 풀빌라에서 가족들과 조용히 휴식할 수 있어 무엇보다 좋았다. 앞바다는 맑고 얕으면서 파도는 있어 즐겁게 놀수 있었다. 바다와 수영장 빌라의 풀을 오가며 늦게까지 편안한 시간을 보낼수 있어 무엇보다 좋았다.
sample_comments.negatives: 깜란지역 리조트들이 다 그렇겠지만 마트도 없고 식당도 한정적이에요.

sample_comments.title: Very satisfied for the price.
sample_comments.text: There is a city bus that leaves once a day at 9 o'clock and returns at 3:30, so if you make a reservation in advance, it will help you save on transportation costs. There is a laundry drying rack, but it is small, so having hangers would be better (I brought foldable hangers from Daiso). There is a washing machine, but there is no detergent, so please bring your own (I also bought coin detergent from Daiso). When playing in the pool, the floor can be rough, so the kids' hands and feet might get scraped. I think they should wear aqua shoes while playing. Instead of a review, I have briefly noted some tips for using the place. I feel that as a family travel accommodation, this place is quite nice!

sample_comments.positives: 리조트는 가족이 지내기에 더할 나위없이 편안하고 깨끗합니다 꽤 큰 단지임에도 빌라간 소음으로 불편함이 전혀 없어 편안하게 쉴 수 있어요 비행기 시간으로 인해 late checkout을 요청했는데 흔쾌히 우리가 편히 준비할수 있도록 해 주었습니다 지내는 동안 늘 밝은 얼굴로 응대했던 Hien, Ngoc, Hani 를 칭찬합니다. 골프클럽 등 무거운 짐이 많았는데 늘 웃으며 안전운행 해주신 버기 기사님들도 감사했습니다
sample_comments.negatives: 아무래도 시내와 거리가 있어서 시내에 한번 나가면 뽕을 뽑고 리조트로 돌아와야 해요 ㅎㅎ

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: New, clean & beautiful resort with private beach. The staff was friendly & helpful too. We book 1-bedroom villa with pool. It's spacious, tidy & the pool is quite big for a family. Breakfast is ala carte, not many options but taste good. The public pool (salt-water) is huge and beautiful. There is an indoor playground for kids too. Recommended for family with kids.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào Ngọc,
Thank for choosing Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh during your relaxation trip in Cam Ranh. We highly appreciate your good words about our resort and staff. We're now serving Breakfast Buffet and received good comments about it. We hope to welcome you and your family again in this summer.
Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh Management.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: 내부가 정말 넓고 바다가 바로 앞에 있어서 뷰도 예쁘고 쾌저해서 좋았어요

sample_comments.title: Overall, a good relaxation space.
sample_comments.text:
The staff are very friendly (impressive). Everyone I met was kind and lovely. Thanks to the staff, my memories of Wyndham are so pleasant. At the end, I briefly lost my wallet, but everyone worried and helped as if it was their own issue, and I was grateful for that. The spa was included, and it was much more luxurious than I expected, I was very satisfied; this place was better than anywhere in Nha Trang city. I made my reservation via email about two weeks in advance. 

There weren't many reviews about the swimming pool, so I didn't know, but the pool is great! The water is clean and well maintained. It's spacious, and the depths vary. The photos turn out really well, it's the best! The pool inside the villa is also clean and larger than I expected. There are sunbeds, but they get too much direct sunlight, so lying down was a bit difficult. 

The resort is large, and when I called for a buggy car, I thought I might be late for my spa appointment, so I walked instead. It doesn't come immediately; it seems like it takes about 10 minutes, but if you're Korean, you might find it hard to wait... There are no dishes inside, but there's an oven, microwave, coffee pot, induction cooktop, etc. I used one coffee pot, but it was dirty inside, so I washed it before using it. I'm not sensitive, so it wasn't a big deal for me... haha.

During my stay, there were about three power outages in the villa. The problem was that data reception inside the villa was poor, so I had to rely on Wi-Fi, and at those moments, data was weak, which caused some trouble. 

In-villa dining was generally tasty, but the Bolognese pasta was completely unseasoned... Everything else, apart from the pasta, was delicious hahaha. The breakfast might have fewer varieties compared to the famous Amiana and other resorts, but I thought it was tasty? I was satisfied. 

I used a filter shower head, and it didn't get that dirty. Still, it might be good to have! If you have a Samsung phone, you can screen mirror to the TV, so you can watch Netflix and YouTube, leaving no time to be bored:)

을 선택해 주셔서 감사합니다 Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh. 저희 리조트의 서비스와 직원에 대한 좋은 평가에 감사드립니다. 저희 리조트에 다시 오시기를 환영하고 고객님께 기억에 남는 경험을 제공해드리겠습니다. 
Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh 관리

sample_comments.title: Very good.
sample_comments.text: I stayed with my parents, and the room was spacious, there were plenty of bathrooms, and there was a private pool, which was great. I was a bit disappointed that the shared swimming pool wasn't as big as I expected, and there was one room on the first floor, so it was a bit difficult to carry the luggage up to the second floor.

sample_comments.negatives: 룸 등 청소상태는 살짝 아쉬웠습니다.

sample_comments.title: The staff is very friendly.
sample_comments.text: I chose Wyndham Garden as my last night's accommodation because it is close to the airport, and everything from the cleanliness to the bedding was in good condition, allowing for a pleasant stay. Above all, I want to commend the kindness of the staff. It was great that Manager Hani could communicate with us in our language, and most importantly, her problem-solving skills were outstanding. I wanted to extend my stay, and she presented conditions that were favorable to us while thoughtfully considering ways to alleviate any inconvenience. I am very grateful for that. I definitely plan to use this place again on my next visit and will promote it to those around me. Thank you, Manager Hani.

sample_comments.title: I'll be back.
sample_comments.positives: 직원들이 매우 친절함. 특히 한국어 가능한 직원 최고^^ 너무나 즐겁고 편한 여행이 되었습니다. 다시 방문 할께요.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional

The staff were very friendly, and I had some clothes left behind at the resort that were lost, but the handling process was very satisfactory and they were very attentive. Thank you to the staff member *** who is beautiful and spoke Korean well. I want to keep this as a good memory and would like to use it again next time.

sample_comments.title: Family travel recommendations
sample_comments.text: The accommodation is very spacious and beautiful with a large dining table, a big living room, and many rooms. Each building has 3 rooms, but if you choose a two-room option, one room is locked. The private pool is great for playing, and the shared pool is also very large and nice. There's a large snail or salamander living in the garden, making it perfect for kids who love those creatures. The breakfast is decent as well. There are many places to take photos, and nearby, there are massage shops. It takes about 15 minutes by taxi to buy ramen, water, and gifts, as well as supermarkets and restaurants for shopping. I highly recommend it.

sample_comments.text: The room conditions are good, and the staff's friendliness is excellent above all. It is a really good accommodation for this price range. The staff member who speaks Korean well was a great help. Thanks to them, I had an even more comfortable and pleasant trip!!!!

sample_comments.positives: 일단 공항가깝고 공항픽업서비스 이용가능했고 신식호텔이라 깨끗하고 룸여러개 있는 풀빌라라 가족여행으로 좋았습니다. 가성비도 너무좋았고 서비스도 좋았습니다. 조식만 평범하구 나머지는 다 대만족입니다! 시내 셔틀도있어서 불편한점 하나도없이 잘 다녀왔여요. 다음에또가고싶네요
sample_comments.negatives: 조식메뉴만 조금 아쉬웠지만 나쁘진않습니다

sample_comments.title: Review of accommodation on my first trip to Nha Trang.
sample_comments.text: This is my first time in Nha Trang and I came with excitement. First of all, it's unbelievable that a whole house accommodation is under 100,000 won per night; it was very clean, spacious, and great. The shower filter did get dirty quickly, but it wasn't a problem, and I had a perfect day. The gym is small but good to use, and there are amenities like a table tennis room and a billiard room, making it great for entertainment. I also had breakfast, which was perfectly to my taste. This accommodation has the best value for money. Having a private pool was also really nice. I plan to come back to Nha Trang again and will book this place again! The staff were really friendly, and I take away good memories. Haha.

sample_comments.title: Recommended resorts near Nha Trang Airport.
sample_comments.text: The room is nice... The outdoor pool is great too.. It's good for relaxing. The restaurant in front of the pool has delicious pizza... For dinner, we had BBQ, but three guys ordered a BBQ for two, and it was too much to finish.... I highly recommend this villa for its value.

개구린지 뭔지가 시끄럽게 울어요 ㅠㅠ

It's close to the airport, so you can enjoy the pool until late in the evening, and it takes less than 5 minutes to the airport after checkout. They even prepared a cake for my birthday... Surprise!!! Thanks to that, my whole family had a wonderful and enjoyable staycation.

sample_comments.positives: yên tĩnh

sample_comments.title: Very okay.
sample_comments.text: This area consists of villas rented out by the homeowners for Wyndham Garden to manage the business. It's very suitable for families because the spacious 3-bedroom villa can accommodate up to ten people. For solo travelers or couples, sharing is not very convenient unless you book the entire villa. The staff here are very friendly and supportive, especially a lady named Ngoc. Thank you all very much. Note that there are many homeowners in this area who rent directly but lack professionalism, and booking through Agoda may sometimes result in no communication, so in this area, it's safest to book through Wyndham Garden.

sample_comments.title: It's great for families (with young children and elderly parents) to come.

Haha, I recommend it if you're picky about food or planning to come with children or grandparents~ It's spacious, friendly, and the food quality is good. It's close to the airport, and if you want, you can take a car to nearby restaurants for local seafood. The private barbecue was expensive for Vietnam, but it was a fascinating experience. Haha

sample_comments.title: Wyndham exceeded my expectations.
sample_comments.text: The Wyndham was really nice. There were no bugs at all (I didn't even see a single cockroach or ant). I saw the staff cleaning the nearby accommodation, and they even sprayed disinfectant. It's close to the airport, and each accommodation has a private pool, which is great for fun, and the public pool is also nice for playing with kids. I ordered room service, and the food was delicious. I found the breakfast to be okay as well, especially the pho broth was rich. There are female staff members who can communicate in Korean (they are fluent). The manager and all the staff were friendly. Late check-out is possible, so if you have a late flight at night, I recommend checking out at 6 PM. Checking out after that requires paying 100% of the price for an additional night. You need to solve everything internally, so one day I ordered takeout, which can be received at the main gate. Also, it turns out you can cook meals at the accommodation. However, you need to either bring your cooking tools in advance or order them additionally. I plan to prepare more thoroughly next time. It exceeded my expectations, so I would consider revisiting.
sample_comments.response: Xin chào, Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh 을 선택해 주셔서 감사합니다. 저희 리조트의 서비스와 직원에 대한 좋은 평가에 항상 깊이 감사드립니다. 모든 고객님께 항상 좋은 기억과 따스한 경험을 제공해 드릴 것을 약속드리며, 언제든 저희 리조트에서 다시 뵙기를 바라겠습니다. Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh관리부 드림

sample_comments.title: This is Nha Trang.
sample_comments.text: It was the first resort I visited with a private pool, and the location was very close to the airport, which gave me plenty of time when departing on an early morning flight. The cleanliness of the accommodation and the breakfast exceeded expectations, as many blogs suggested, and it was delicious. Since I had to leave early and couldn't have breakfast that day, they prepared sandwiches for me, and they even had the courtesy to call a minibus for me should I need to go to the city~^^ Of course, I had to cover the transportation costs, but it eliminated the hassle of having to consider transport options! If I go back, I would definitely stay there again 100%. The kids loved it so much that I wanted to stay even longer~^^

sample_comments.title: Resort đẹp, sạch sẽ, biển đẹp, nhân viên ứng xử không tốt.
sample_comments.positives: Chỗ nghỉ tiện nghi, sạch sẽ, biển đẹp.
sample_comments.negatives:
Nhân viên: Sau khi đi về lần đầu mình tiếp tục đặt cho cả nhà vào ngày lễ 2/9. Tuy nhiên, khi trả phòng, bạn nhân viên báo phòng mình làm bể gáo dừa múc nước ở lu nước rửa chân trước villa (bạn cho xem hình thì không phải bể mà nức 1 đường ở giữa gáo dừa). Mình nói là nhà mình chưa hề đụng tới gáo dừa và thực sự mình còn không biết là cái lu nước nằm ở đâu. Mình thấy vô lý vì chả lẽ khi vào ở mình còn phải kiểm tra tới cái gáo dừa xem nó có bị hư hỏng gì không. Sau khi mình nói vậy thì bạn nhân viên đi vào nói chuyện gì đó và báo mình phòng đã xong. Bạn còn kèm cho mình 1 câu "nếu chị không chịu thanh toán thì em cũng không làm gì được". Nghe mà tức ngang và mất luôn cảm tình với cái resort. Mình đánh giá cách ứng xử của nhân viên quá tệ. Và cách resort bắt khách hàng đền tới cái gáo dừa cũng quá tệ. Mong resort không vì những cái nhỏ như vậy mà đánh mất cảm tình của khách hàng.
Check out: kiểm phòng quá lâu.

sample_comments.text: I love the staff, they are very attentive and always eager to help. Jasmine Spa is very good, the therapists were professional and very skilled, plus they have discounts if you go in a group. Pool and beach is clean and beautiful. Villa is exceptionally clean, spacious and well maintained for the price you pay. Food is OK - Vietnamese food is very delicious but the Western and Korean food is so-so. I'll come back again!
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào Jo,
Thank for choosing us during your relaxation trip in Cam Ranh. We're so happy to receive your good words about our Villa, Spa service and staff. We would love to welcome you again in Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh soon. 
Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh Management.

sample_comments.title: Villa 3 chambres avec piscine
sample_comments.text: Villa 3 chambres avec piscine privé tres agreable. Villa propre avec cuisine mais pas equipé (pas d assiette, couvert, casserole etc...). Bon rapport qualité prix mais aucune activité le soir a part le SPA (un peu cher) le bar ferme a21h30 puis c est le calme plat. Dans la journée il y a juste la piscine et la mer avec quelque parasol. Le centre ville est a 40 minutes de l hotel donc assez eloigné sinon il y a l hotel movenpick a 5 minutes qui a plusieurs resto bord de plage, bars, activite piscine et bord de mer, night club, billard, tennis de table, musique et meme show mais bien plus cher.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào Francisco, 
Merci d'avoir choisi le Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh. Nous sommes impatients de vous accueillir à nouveau dans notre complexe et de vous offrir une expérience mémorable.
 Conseil d'administration de Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh.

sample_comments.title: Ok
sample_comments.positives: Thoải mái
sample_comments.negatives: Menu không đa dạng

sample_comments.title: Bon séjour
sample_comments.text:
Hôtel très proche de l'aéroport mais aucune nuisances sonores, ce qui est bien. 
Très beaux jardins. 
Personnel toujours souriant, agréable mais parfois un peu lent pour le service au restaurant et pas toujours à l'aise avec l'anglais. 
Plage merveilleuse, idyllique.....très propre avec des transats et parasols. Les serviettes sont à récupérer à la piscine. 
Piscine très belle avec de la végétation autour. Petit bémol, compliqué de trouver un transat libre à certains moments de la journée. 
Salle de petit-déjeuner un peu décevante car fait un peu cantine avec tout ces touristes pas très aimables et sales.
Le seul et unique restaurant à côté de la piscine est bon. 
Les villas sont très spacieuses, agréables, climatisées et avec une machine à laver bien appréciée (pas de lessive). Le domaine est tellement vaste qu'une petite voiturette peut venir vous chercher ou vous ramener à votre villa. Le ménage n'est pas parfait. 
L'hôtel n'est ouvert que depuis quelques mois (2022) donc des pistes d'améliorations doivent être envisagées. 
Par exemple une petite boutique de produits de première nécessité serait à prévoir (avec des chips, friandises, lessive, crème après soleil....) car il n'y a rien autour. 
De même, le soir, peut-être prévoir un bar avec un peu de musique, un billard....car il n'y a rien comme animation. 
Tout cela n'a rien de critique mais ce sont plutôt des conseils car nous projetons de revenir l'an prochain quelques jours avec les enfants.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào Astrid,
Merci beaucoup d'avoir choisi Wyndham Garden cam Ranh lors de votre voyage de détente à Cam Ranh. Nous avons remarqué tous vos commentaires constructifs sur nos services et notre personnel. Nous allons améliorer la qualité de notre service et nous espérons vous accueillir bientôt pour voir comment nous avons essayé.
Équipe de gestion du Wyndham Garden Cam Ranh.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: ビーチが思ったより綺麗でよかった。折角海が綺麗なのにプールからは木で遮られ見られず残念。プールで飲み物を頼むと提供までにとても時間がかかった。チェックイン時のウェルカムドリンクは無かった。朝食会場は二階の会議室のようなところに通された。一階には日当たりの良い朝食会場があり、二階には会議室のような朝食会場があるが二階はアジア人が多く通されているように感じた。ヴィラはスペースが存分に有りストレス無く使えた。部屋にプールもあるので家族連れにはとても良いと思うが優雅なリゾートという雰囲気ではないかも。朝早くに近くのヴィラで子供がプールではしゃいでいたので起きることになった。

sample_comments.title: 可以推介嘅住宿
sample_comments.text: 整體感覺別墅式住宿環境都很優美，乾淨。室內裝修簡潔。 唔豪華，但可以算夠用。如果可以提供廚房。 一啲煮食用具清潔用品會比較好。 抹布都沒有。可以有這些餐具回報才可作簡單嘅主要食廚房又大桌子又實用。啊，酒店早餐一般款式不少。 但係衞生情況麻麻，好多蚊子飛來飛去，沒有蓋子蓋好食物。離機場非常之近。 如果旅程去到最尾，會比較適合出去。 市區大約要去30分鐘。如果叫做咩？ 高爾夫？ 球車都要等一點時間。 因為車輛不多。另外，沙灘和泳池環境都好乾淨，唔算人流多，仲有水泡供應。

sample_comments.title: Rất hài lòng
sample_comments.positives:
- Địa điểm tốt, bãi biển riêng rất trong xanh và sạch sẽ. Tuy nhiên lại có hàng rào cây ngăn cách giữa bãi biển và tầm nhìn từ hồ bơi, nên giảm mất view đẹp
- Tôi ở biệt thự hướng vườn, 3 phòng ngủ (1 br 2 giường đơn ở tầng trệt, và 2 br 1 giường đôi lớn trên lầu 2). Biệt thự được thiết kế và trang trí nội thất rất thuận lợi và ấm áp như ở nhà, sạch sẽ, cách âm tốt nên rất yên tĩnh.
- Bếp được trang bị: bếp từ, lò nướng, tủ lạnh, lò vi sóng và máy giặt. Tuy nhiên không có dụng cụ nấu ăn và gia vị (nếu cần thì liên hệ lễ tân và có phụ phí), gia vị phải tự mua, bột giặt cũng vậy.
- Gọi xe điện đưa đón từ biệt thự đến lễ tân rất nhanh và nhân viên rất vui vẻ nhiệt tình
- Món ăn tại nhà hàng tương đối ngon, trình bày đẹp mắt (nhiều món kiểu Hàn quốc)
- Bể bơi nước mặn rộng và đẹp, nhưng nước có vẻ không được trong lắm (biển nước còn trong hơn)
sample_comments.negatives:
- Bể bơi riêng tại biệt thự: gọi là bể bơi nhưng thực ra chỉ là bể sục (sâu 1,1 m, dài khoảng 5m và rộng khoảng 3m), vì biển đẹp nên nhà tôi không dùng đến bể này. Nhà nào có con nít thì có chỗ này vui chơi cũng được. Tuy nhiên thời gian sục khí đã được cài đặt, nhiều khi không tiện lắm.
- Bữa sáng đăng trên booking là 400k/người nhưng nếu mua tại resort thì chỉ có 280-350k :( - Bữa sáng có chi phí tương đối cao, nên tôi chọn không ăn sáng
- Trên lầu 2 không bắt được wifi nên kỹ thuật phải mang đến một thiết bị phát/booster

sample_comments.title: 다낭여행 중 최악의 추억을 경험한 호텔
sample_comments.text:
다낭 여행 다 좋았는데.
이호텔때문에 기분 망했어요.
리뷰 좋은거 믿고 방도 스위트 예약해서 7박이나 예약하고 갔는데..
배정받은 스위트 방이 첫날 도착한날부터 변기에 소변자국 그대로 있고. 청소가 아예 안된상태 였어요.
게다가 객실 바닥은 얼마나 더러운지 2살아기랑 함께한 여행이었는데 아기 발바닥이 새까맣더라구요. 물티슈로 몇번 닦아 냈나 몰라요.
또한 바선생님까지 봤습니다.......

현재 옆에 공사중이여서 밤낮으로 시끄럽고요. 베트남은 새벽에도 밤에도 공사 계속합니다. 밤에 잠을 못자요.

스파 예약하려고 문의했더니 다음날 답변오고 타올 추가로 가져다 달라고하면 세월아네월아.... 하....
한국분들은 여기로 오지마세요.
다낭 음식이며 사람들이며 다 좋았는데 진짜 이호텔만 별로였어요.

저 에지간해서는 후기 안남기는데 다른분들 시간낭비 돈낭비 하지마시라고 남깁니다.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text:
저는 4박 6일간의 여행기간동안 첫날 둘째날을 윈덤가든에서 묵었습니다.

아직 짐정리도 못 한 상태이지만 이렇게 룸컨디션 최악인 곳은 처음이었고, 불쾌한 일도 겪어서 지금 할일이 산더미지만 저만 피해보면 안될 것 같아서 처음으로 리뷰 글을 씁니다..

첫번째, 예약시 요구사항 전혀 들어주지 않음

저는 10개월된 아기랑 가는 첫 여행이라 예약할 떄 요구사항에도 아기가 있어 룸컨디션신경써주시고, 아기침대 요청 했고 그 후 직접 호텔 메일로 5번 넘게 확인하였습니다. 가기 하루전날에도 메일로 아기침대 요청했구요!

아기가 돌도 안되서 아기침대가 꼭 있어야 하는 상황이라 진상같아 보여도... 끈질기게 메일 보냈어요!

물론 아기침대는 호텔 사정에 따라 대여가능할수도 불가능할수도 있다는 것은 저도 압니다.

하지만 저는 미리 사전으로 몇번이나 아기침대를 요청했지만 , 체크인 할때 다시 이야기하니 처음듣는 것처럼 하시더라구요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

숙소에 들어왔는데 아기침대도 없었고, 우선 바닥이 더러웠습니다... 바닥 더럽다는 후기는 많이 봐서 아무래도 서양인들은 신발신고 생활하다보니 어쩔 수 없지 했는데..

다른 호텔 , 리조트들에 비해 청소상태가 너무 엉망이었어요.

세면대 옆 손닦는 수건놓는곳에도 먼지가 가득하고.. 화장실에도 물때가 가득했습니다...

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
